economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in government business enterprises including Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society (property rental/management), Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd. (environmental monitoring), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd. (general partner), and Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe Limited Partnership (forestry/heritage management). During the year, ownership interests in Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP and Centre Creek LP were transferred to Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe LP.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Aitchelitz Taxation Centre (fully consolidated). Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society, Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd., Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd., and Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe Limited Partnership. During the year, ownership interests in Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP and Centre Creek LP were transferred to Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe LP. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($357,300) plus CMHC ($117,071). Minors Trust Fund of $607,201 included in liabilities. GBE partnership financials are as at December 31, 2023 (lagged reporting period).
